commitment_and_tamper_evidence.access_events: CloudTrail S3 GetObject data events; hash-chained export; policy-state snapshots before and after each execution
commitment_and_tamper_evidence.content_commitment: custodian-produced value-blind content commitment (SHA-256 over canonical partition metadata + row-level content hash) committed BEFORE the research team receives the Phase 3A package

extends: prereg v1.0.4 sealed_access_protocol (CloudTrail S3 data events; dedicated IAM principal)
required_properties: separate validation and OOS storage boundaries
read credentials unavailable to ordinary development execution
hash-chained or otherwise tamper-evident access events
explicit authorization event before credentials are released
opened-object ledger for the authorized run
post-run reconciliation against the store-level access log

storage_boundaries.credential_custody: dedicated IAM principal; keys not in developer env; released only on the explicit authorization event
storage_boundaries.oos_partition: separate bucket/prefix; explicit DENY during validation
storage_boundaries.release_mechanism: owner-signed authorization event -> time-bounded credential release -> access recorded

two_required_records.SealedStoreAccessLog: whether ANYTHING opened the partition across program history
